Abdulwahid Zurayq — software and game-development portfolio

whoami

heyy, i’m Abdulwahid — a Computer Engineering student at Kocaeli University and an aspiring game developer from Libya, currently based in İzmit.

i build software, backend tools, interactive experiments, and increasingly more game systems. right now i’m working on Imposter, a multilingual phone-passing social-deduction game.

i like projects where i can understand the whole path from data and logic to the thing a player or user actually touches.

outside code, i teach English, go to the gym, learn languages, play games, and collect project ideas at a rate that is objectively not sustainable.

cat ~/random.md

the side quests are where the website stops pretending to be normal.

cat ~/experience.md

selected chapters. the full lore can live somewhere else.

TT

TAISAT Teknofest Team

Embedded Systems Team Contributor

Contributed to electronics work for an autonomous vehicle project.

March 2025 – August 2025
LA

Lybotics Asteroids Robotics Team

Team Leader and Mentor

Led and mentored a FIRST Tech Challenge robotics team through planning, competition preparation, and technical problem solving.

July 2022 – August 2023
ET

English Time, Körfez

Main Speaking Teacher / English Teacher

Led speaking-focused lessons for learners across different levels and taught a B1 class with an emphasis on fluency, vocabulary, grammar accuracy, and real-life communication.

August 2025 – June 2026
AL

American Life, Kocaeli

English Tutor

Delivered C1 and C2 English lessons focused on fluency, advanced vocabulary, grammar, and real-world communication.

July 2024 – April 2025

ls ~/projects

the ones i would actually defend in an interview.

CV Bro

★

A company-research and internship-outreach tool that checks criteria, avoids duplicate contacts, explains skipped companies, and prepares emails for review.

detail

MemoCore

★

A FastAPI backend for a WhatsApp-based assistant that stores tasks, calendar events, and reminders, then runs scheduled jobs automatically.

detail

Pasaporto

★

An interactive 3D globe for exploring passport mobility and visa permissions between countries.

detail
